summary: Live-applied ADR 0327 on the rebased `codex/ws-0327-live-apply` exact-main worktree by splitting the root agent-discovery registries into sectional source files under `docs/discovery/`, generating compact public-safe root entrypoints plus tracked onboarding packs, tightening the public-entrypoint and retry-guard automation paths, and re-verifying the discovery surfaces through focused tests, repository validation, remote validation, and the full pre-push gate while the global release cut remains blocked by unrelated waiver receipts.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_generate_discovery_artifacts.py tests/test_validate_public_entrypoints.py tests/test_validate_repo_cache.py tests/test_label_studio_sync.py` returned `31 passed in 1.65s`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0327-targeted-tests-r1.txt`.

`uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/generate_discovery_artifacts.py --check` reported `Discovery artifacts OK`, and `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards generated-docs` passed after quoting the workstream shard ADR id, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0327-generate-discovery-check-r1.txt` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0327-agent-standards-generated-docs-r2.txt`.

verification.check: Remote validation on the recovered build-server path
verification.observed: `make remote-validate` passed on the build server with `workstream-surfaces`, `agent-standards`, `ansible-syntax`, `schema-validation`, `atlas-lint`, `policy-validation`, `iac-policy-scan`, `alert-rule-validation`, `type-check`, and `dependency-graph` all green, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0327-mainline-remote-validate-r1.txt`.

`make pre-push-gate` passed on the exact-main worktree with `documentation-index`, `yaml-lint`, `generated-docs`, `generated-portals`, `ansible-syntax`, `ansible-lint`, `semgrep-sast`, `security-scan`, `integration-tests`, and the other blocking checks all green, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0327-mainline-pre-push-gate-r2.txt`.

`make validate` still fails on the current controller-local tree because the shard-backed `workstreams/` files inherited from latest `origin/main` trip the local `yamllint` indentation profile; that upstream baseline issue is preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0327-mainline-validate-r1.txt` and is not specific to the ADR 0327 discovery changes.

`LV3_SKIP_OUTLINE_SYNC=1 uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/release_manager.py status --json` reported repo version `0.178.3`, platform version `0.130.98`, and a blocked release cut because three unrelated `controller_dependency_gap` waiver receipts remain open through `2026-04-06`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0327-mainline-release-status-r1.json`.

notes: This branch-local receipt preserves the exact-main proof from the dedicated worktree before a later numbered repo release is cut.
The generated onboarding packs are intentionally committed artifacts now; `.gitignore` was updated so `build/onboarding/*.yaml` no longer disappears silently from branch diffs.
Because ADR 0327 changes repository coordination rather than live platform infrastructure, `Implemented In Platform Version` remains `N/A` and `platform_version` stays `0.130.98`.
